title: StateRequest
description: Sent by the Conductor to engines whenever app state changes (slider moves, substrate selection, mode toggle). Engines respond with a PredictedLocus.

request_id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4 recommended). Engine echoes this in PredictedLocus.response_id.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the request was issued.

mode.description: Which engine family should respond. 'discrete' = Discrete Engine (v9 operator algebra). 'continuous' = Character Engine (chit, headroom, basin).

framework_version.description: Which version of the MPA framework to compute against (e.g. 'v9.1'). Engines reject requests for incompatible versions.

substrate_class.description: Optional substrate identifier (e.g. 'surface_code_d3', 'spin_glass', 'laser_class_b'). Engines may use this to load substrate-specific parameter defaults.

parameters.description: Substrate parameters. Keys are substrate-specific. Engines validate against their own parameter schemas.

selection.description: Current cross-window selection state. Engines may use this to scope their computation.

time_cursor.description: Trajectory scrubbing position in seconds, or null if not applicable.

selected_region.description: Spatial region selected in 3D view, or null.

request_options.description: Hints to the engine about what to compute. Engines should compute everything if absent.
